theme_and_archetype.rationale: NIUVA requires a clean, modern, industrial-tech aesthetic. Dark navy/charcoal conveys professional R&D and engineering precision, while electric accents highlight innovation.

headings.usage: Hero headings, section titles, major call-outs.

monospace.usage: Order IDs, SLAs, tracking numbers, technical specs.

typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 max text-5xl to text-6xl. Do not skip more than two tailwind size steps between heading and subheading.

background.description: Deepest Charcoal/Navy for main page background.

surface.description: Cards, modals, and dropdowns. Do not use pure black or grey. Maintain the navy tint.

borders.description: Visible grid lines and technical borders.

brand.description: Electric Cobalt Blue as main NIUVA accent, Tech Amber for heat/industrial highlights.

marketing_pages.hero_overlay: bg-black/40 or bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A0B10]/90 to-transparent for readability

dashboard_and_order_flow.grid: Control Room Grid (dense, structured, border-collapse styles)
dashboard_and_order_flow.card_style: Flat, 1px border, no soft shadows. Sharp or 4px radius max.

forms_and_wizard.style: Left-aligned labels, distinct active/focus states with ring-2 ring-blue-500/50.
forms_and_wizard.wizard_steps: Visual stepper using monospace font for numbers, clear active vs pending colors.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism for marketing (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0B10]/70 border-b border-slate-800). Solid for dashboard.

cards.style: Technical Grid Borders. Use 'The Tracing Beam' or subtle top-border accent (border-t-2 border-t-blue-500) for active dashboard widgets.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Mechanical and crisp. Scale down slightly (scale-95) on click, rapid color transitions (duration-150).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Staggered fade-up for portfolio items and dashboard widgets.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings mandatory.

icons.styling: stroke-width: 1.5 for a precise, engineered look.

hero.description: White and blue futuristic EV prototype for the bold homepage hero visual.
hero.treatment: Use gradient overlay from left to ensure text legibility.

services_3d_printing.description: Close up of an industrial 3D printing machine with blue light.

services_ev_design.description: Red EV shaped prototype on black surface for EV Design pillar.

company_about.description: Modern tech office/laboratory reflecting PT Niuva's R&D studio.

partnerships_logos.name: Telkom University / Bandung Techno Park Placeholder 1

testing.attributes: All interactive elements, forms, links, and buttons MUST use role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='order-submit-button', data-testid='language-toggle').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global Bilingual (ID/EN) state management affects both marketing and dashboard views.
Implement the 3D printing order wizard with strict SLA messaging ('1x24 jam') clearly visible in the UI.
Portfolio grid must feature a Lightbox gallery for zooming into images and 3D models.
Admin dashboard should utilize pure Shadcn tables/cards but styled with the Technical Grid Borders defined in components_strategy.
